payload.answer: Unable to extract memory from the article because the source returned a 404 network error.
payload.decision: No durable memory extracted because the article fetch failed with a 404 network error; content is unavailable and should not be committed as a factual memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The referenced URL could not be fetched, so no article entity or content could be reliably resolved.

payload.intent: Remember an article at https://example.com/missing for its relevance to memory architecture.
repair_options: Retry fetching the URL if it may be temporarily unavailable.
Provide the article text or an accessible mirror.
Supply a summary or key excerpts to extract memory cards from.
